data.content: Shipment review approved on 2026-03-30. Verified local HEAD and origin/main both point to commit 3f6e5a9f1e02, the knot includes tag commit:3f6e5a9f1e02, the shipped diff on src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx is limited to the intended case-insensitive substring filter behavior, no knot invariants are defined, and GitHub Actions runs 23738970132 (CI) and 23738970088 (Coverage Badge) both completed successfully for that SHA.
